scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup:backend:darwin: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:backend:linux: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:backend:win32: cd backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:backend:default: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
